recommendation: Breaking change detected for fields that active registered consumers depend on. Deployment should be blocked.
notes: No explicit current snapshot was supplied, so a simulated 'rename_confidence_field' schema change was created for Phase 4 testing.
producer_next_actions: Block producer deployment until impacted consumers have a migration plan.
Update contract_registry/subscriptions.yaml with any new field names, aliases, or migration notes before release.
Publish a compatibility notice to affected subscribers and regenerate the contract snapshot after the schema fix or migration.
Prefer deprecating the old field with an alias period before removing or renaming it outright.

changes.rationale: Field rename is breaking because existing consumers depend on the previous field path.

breaking_fields.reason: Confidence scale drives trust weighting and graph annotation quality in downstream cartography.
Stable document identity is required to link extraction outputs to lineage or graph nodes.
The generator depends on the nested fact structure to flatten the dataset and infer fact-level clauses.
Range and drift clauses are generated from the observed fact confidence distribution.
Confidence is a critical semantic field and should block on range or high-severity drift in enforce mode.
Hash integrity is used as part of the contract's structural guarantees.
